====Pokémon Adventures====
[[File:Sapphire Adventures.png|thumb|250px|Sapphire Birch, May's [[Pokémon Adventures]] counterpart]]
{{main|Sapphire (Adventures)}}
May's counterpart in [[Pokémon Adventures]] is Sapphire, who, unlike her other counterparts, takes up Gym challenges and is an all-around tomboy thanks to a traumatic incident with {{adv|Ruby}} where a {{TP|Zinnia|Salamence}} attacked them when they were children. She does have a feminine side, however, as is shown in later volumes.
